feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can we see IDOC xml in SXMB_MONI for Outbound IDOC from ECC
entry.content:
Hi All,

SAP S4/ECC is sending Outbound IDOC to SAP PO over IDOC_AAE adapter in PO but somehow we are not able to see IDOC messages in ECC in SXMB_MONI tcode. 

Is there any settings to be done in ECC to view IDOC xml in SXMB_MONI tcode? Pls help asap.

Regards

Mahesh

entry.title: "Combination of plant and movement not allowed"
entry.content:
Got an error while doing GR for consignment type P.O and IBD is created for this P.O

Error is : "Combination of plant and movement not allowed"

entry.title: F150 - Sending email to CC
entry.content:
Greetings everyone,

User requirement is to send the dunning notice generated through F150 via email to the client, and inserting in CC the user responsible for creating the sales document that hasn't been paid yet.

We are implementing BTE 1040 for the dunning event and the email is sent correctly when populating c_finaa-nacha = 'I', however the BTE 1040 interface has no field referring to the document that the system is creating the dunning notice for. Table MHND is empty at the time of code execution so we cannot consult that table to know which notice is linked to which document at runtime.

Do you have any tips regarding this?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: special characters are not getting converted sometimes while Outbound IDOC is triggered from S4 Sys
entry.content:
Hi All,

IDOC(SUBMAS01) is being sent from EHS S4 system to SAP PO middleware and its being successfully processed E2E (SAP S4->PO->Downstream sys) for some of the EHS Specifications. But recently EHS is migrated from ECC to S4 and after data migration when some of the specifications are triggered from EHS IDOC is coming to middleware but special Characters are not getting converted to unicode  (e.g<DATAORIGIN>EH&S</DATAORIGIN> to <DATAORIGIN>EH&S</DATAORIGIN>) and in xml if its not getting converted its failing in middleware since these characters((&,<= ) makes xml as non well formed xml.

Could you please let us know what could be reason that some specifications IDOC gets triggered with unicode conversion for special characters(&,<=) and for some specifications IDOC is not converting these special characters to unicode.

Regards

Mahesh

entry.title: batch generation in ewm (ECC6)
SAP S/4HANA Structure for Developer
entry.content:
I am new to SAP, learning ABAP development and working in SD Moule.
Are there Courses or Documents that help to understand SAP system from the Developer's point of view?
Where I can understand the flow of the data and code, learn the best practices, restrictions functions, etc.
Learn about implementing Extensions, Enhancements, Amendments, and Exist.
Also learn about extending or enhancing Fiori Launchpad Apps.
BAPI, ALV, etc.

entry.title: SAP exception messages difference between MD04/table MDTB and BAPI
entry.content:
HI，

The same material in the same plant at the same time

Exception Messages

Tcode MD04 ：10 07

Table MDTB：U1（10） T4（07）

BAPI MD_STOCK_REQUIREMENTS_LIST_API：U3（20） T4（07）

Why the exception messages difference between MD04/table MDTB and BAPI ？

Can you help me？Thanks.

entry.title: GOS problem => read local file before opening menu
entry.content:
Hi experts,

very strange problem that occurs more and more the last days:

User opens for example a PO (ME23N) and press the little arrow in the GOS object on top to open the menu of the GOS object. Now we session freezes for ~ 10 minutes, then the menu is open. Now user is able to open and close the menu "online". If I do the same => no problem! 

Did some traces (SAP side, Gui side), found that the system wants to change file permissions of a file on a share for that user. Problem => share not available anymore. Same trace for my user => system do not want to change file permissions on that share. 

NOw changed security in SAPGUI itself (From deactivated to customized). Now I get 7 popups, all to files on a share...I don't get the point why with opening GOS menu system wants to change file permissions? It is really just opening menu!

SAPGUI version from 740 to 800, doesn't matter.

Any ideas and suggestions?

Thanks

Michael

entry.title: In the sales order header prices are getting zero or not able to see the conditons
entry.content:
Hi All!

Not able to get the header conditions in the sales order. i request you kindly.

Kindly find the below screenshot for your reference.

entry.title: CK40N costing level doesn't show materials costed without errors
entry.content:
Hello,

In CK40N, on tab "Costing levels" the following is displayed:

Level No objects Mesage No COst estimates Costing msgs Status Costing status
7 12 0 12 2 KA Costed Without Errors
6 40 0 40 114 KF Costed with Errors
5 286 0 286 202 KF Costed with Errors
4 489 0 489 63 KF Costed with Errors
3 1.627 0 1.627 117 KF Costed with Errors
2 7.502 0 7.502 381 KF Costed with Errors
1 914 0 914 90 KF Costed with Errors

Looks like 12 materials have been costed overall without error. But this is not the case. 12 materials on level 7 have been costed without error. But there are more materials that have been costed without error, if I go to "Material Overview", on a different level. But these materials are not shown on tab "Costing levels" with status KA Costed without error.

Is that a bug, should I open an incident to SAP?

Thank you,
Joachim

entry.title: Impact of reverting ADVANCED_INDEX_COMPRESSION_OPTIONS parameter
entry.content:
Hi Sap,

We are reverting ADVANCED_INDEX_COMPRESSION_OPTIONS parameter and rebuilding the affected indexes in our SAP environment. 

Please let us know if 

  1. Any potential risks or side effects associated with this change.
  2. Impact on data consistency.
  3. Any recommended best practice or steps to mitigate risks and ensure a smooth transition.

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Fixed Assets - Change the base value to the beggining of the first adquisition - MACRS depreciation
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

I would like to ask if you know how to proceed in the following scenario. At the company where I work, we have a situation where a fixed asset is purchased in year 1, and in year 2 or 3, there is an addition to that fixed asset. They are asking me to start depreciating that addition from year 1, and additionally, to calculate all this under the MACRS depreciation model. Does anyone have any idea how I can configure the depreciation key in this case? The calculation works correctly when I bring the value of the initial acquisition, but when I record the addition, the calculations are no longer correct.

entry.title: MUV not charged to parent item during close out
entry.content:
hi

We just raised multiple ticket regarding unposted MUV-material usage variances not charged to specific parent item during production order closeout. Closeout transaction was not posted also on the inventory audit report.

Hoping you could help us

 

thanks much,

lorie-from Philippines

entry.title: Enter rate/ EUR rate type m for 11.04.2024 in the system settings.
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

In QM02 Transaction, I am trying to do create return delivery. but when i click on it the above error is popping up. could you please help me to resolve this.

thank you in advance

entry.title: Offline Backup
entry.content:
Hi, In our production system, we've scheduled for one offline backup each week, and a daily online backup. However, encountering issues post the offline backup, such as some locks are not cleared causing disruptions to our operations, prompts us to reconsider the frequency of our offline backups. We aim to determine the best practice for offline backups, whether it should occur weekly, monthly, or quarterly. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Kanban with production orders: Scheduling of orders
entry.content:
Hello,
We are currently testing the introduction of Kanban with production orders (control type: processing with production orders / preliminary planning with MRP).

We are using a separate order type with production control profile 000001, in which there are no special settings. Orders are scheduled forwards.

The day before yesterday, we set a Kanban card to empty, whereupon a production order was created. However, the scheduling is unclear to us (the start of the FEAUF is on 16.05., the end on 03.06.). Yesterday and today we have again set a Kanban card to empty, again a FEAUF was created. The scheduling of the FEAUFs is exactly the same as for the first one. We don't understand why SAP schedules the production orders in this way. Our expectation would be that the production order takes today's date as the start date.

Can someone help us with this and explain how SAP schedules the dates for this? Or where this can be set?

Thank you very much.

Best regards
Josef

entry.title: FCO-00011 The step start with step key |NW_ABAP_OneHost|ind|ind|ind|ind|0|0|NW_Onehost_System|ind|i
entry.content:
At phase 45 of SAP ECC6 EHP6 installation, i am getting this error message


ERROR 2024-04-18 15:59:08.163
unknown message ID (nw.progress.startupFailed,HLP,DVEBMGS00,STARTING,SHUTDOWN)

FCO-00011 The step start with step key |NW_ABAP_OneHost|ind|ind|ind|ind|0|0|NW_Onehost_System|ind|ind|ind|ind|onehost|0|NW_CI_Instance|ind|ind|ind|ind|ci|0|NW_CI_Instance_Start|ind|ind|ind|ind|start|0|start was executed with status ERROR

entry.title: Additional TO got created with over picked quantity
entry.content:
Warehouse Picker picked the delivery quantities and confirmed TOs but system allowed to create another TO for the quantities which are already picked (Over picked). The goods issue quantity , invoice quantity and the packing slips are matching the delivery quantity which . The over picked quantity is sitting at the shipping area. 

Please advise .

entry.title: Base value key for dep. calculate - ZA
entry.content:
Hi we have seen in the system - transaction AFAMS - in the multi-lve. metho. level under Base. Value 
a Baseline Value ZA = free for modification. 

I see the following info. 

Base value for depreciation calculation.

Along with the standard base values supplied by SAP, you can also use your own base value.  You define this user-specific base value using a customer enhancement (user exit) that has already been set up.

Does anyone have any idea which users already exist here? and where this is maintained?

many thanks

entry.title: The project system should automatically update the equipment usage counter
entry.content:
My requirement is to update my equipment counter via PS network.
The confirmation should be the trigger for creating the measurement document.

My Equipment is a PRT and the Counter is Type V = Usage Counter. 

For Production Order it wokred perfectly fine, but now we need to create the mesaurment dosument via the PS System. 

Is this a standard SAP functionality?

#PRT #Usage Counter #Equipment #Project System
